name: Snouts & Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. With an adult's help, empty the cans of beans into a saucepan and add Worcestershire sauce, brown sugar, BBQ sauce, and Teriyaki sauce to the beans. Stir and set aside.
2. With an adult's help, slice off the ends of the knockwurst. Then slice the knockwurst into equal segments about 1 inch long, making each cut at the same slight angle. Using a carrot peeler with the round tip, carefully scrape the skin from the snouts to create a clean surface.
3. Place the snouts in a saucepan and cover them with water. With an adult's help, cook the snouts for about 5-10 minutes until tender.
4. Cook the beans on low heat, stirring often, until the sauce bubbles and thickens slightly.
5. Carefully remove the snouts using tongs or a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels. Pour the beans into a serving dish and arrange the snouts, nostril sides up, on top. Serves 4-6 people.
Note: For presentation, consider arranging the knockwurst with the snouts in an appealing manner.
